core — Core classes¶

Module author: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

Introduction¶

All the different features in SemperPy are developped as independently as possible to make sure that sub-parts of the framework can be used without the need for the whole framework to be installed and particularly to be known by the user.

The Core module of SemperPy is an exception as most other modules will probably depend on this one. However, it is meant to be lightweight and define very general tools. It is strongly recommended to make use of the tools supplied in core to make the maintenance of the framework easier through changes in Python and other main modules.

Contents:¶

  • configfile — Configuration file tools
    • The ConfigFile class
  • configure — Configuration tools
    • The Configure class
  • date — Date manipulation
    • The Date class
    • The DateIncrement class
    • The Dates function
  • dategroup — Date grouping tools
    • The DateGroup class
  • factory — Factory class
    • The Factory class
  • index — Indexing data using flexible multiple criteria
    • The Index class
    • An example
  • innerpython — Python internals
    • The InnerPython class
  • json — Conversion to and from json
    • The Json class
  • texttemplate — Handling text templates to generate titles
    • The TextTemplate class
  • truthparser — Parsing Boolean expressions
    • The TruthParser class
    • TruthParser Examples
  • tools — Micellaneous language tools
    • Miscellaneous classes and functions
